title: 'Starmer accused of Mandelson cover up' and 'Time for Strait talking'

title: Sudanese band Aswat Almadina on playing on through the war
description: One of Sudan's most popular bands, Aswat Almadina, recall being in the studio when the war broke out three years ago.
content:
Members of one of Sudan's most influential bands, Aswat Almadina, are scattered across the world, clinging to the hope that their music will be an inspiration for peace in a nation ravaged by war.

title: Chelsea: Pressure mounts for Liam Rosenior's side with fan protests and another costly loss
description: Chelsea head coach Liam Rosenior admits his side face a "mountain to climb" as their campaign unravels at a crucial juncture following defeat by Manchester United.
content:
There were chants of "we want our Chelsea back" during a protest march before kick-off - then the chorus spread to the stands during the second half of the defeat by Manchester United.

title: Can I trust health advice from an AI chatbot?
description: Abi has had very mixed results when asking a chatbot for guidance about her health issues.
content:
For the past year, Abi has been using ChatGPT – one of the best known AI chatbots – to help manage her health.
The appeal is clear. It can feel impossible to get hold of a GP and artificial intelligence is always ready to answer your questions. And A... [6070 chars]

title: From snapping up the next Mohamed Salah to nailing the Anfield leadership group, to making the right call on Arne Slot and overseeing an Alexis Mac Allister reboot - these are the five things Liverpoo
